title: caladium bicolor var. devosianum
intro: Caladium bicolor var. devosianum, also known as the elephant ear or Heart of Jesus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Arum. It is native to Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
